name: Banana Orange Softies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine mashed bananas, margarine, and orange juice. Mix well.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and grated orange peel to the mixture. Stir until combined.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients (oats, flour, baking soda, salt, nutmeg) and raisins. Mix until just incorporated.
5. Scoop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Let cool on the cookie sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack.
7. Drizzle with orange icing (see recipe below) once cooled.
Orange Icing:
3/4 cup Powdered sugar
5 teaspoons Orange juice
1 teaspoon Grated orange peel
Nutritional Analysis per serving:
calories 138
carbohydrates 19 g
protein 2 g
fat 6 g
calcium 9 mg
sodium 70 mg
cholesterol 20 mg
dietary fiber 1 g
